reply_original: Hi there, I am truly sorry for the disappointing experience. We care deeply about your time with us and want to make things right. Could you please share what went wrong? Please email us at support@fantachat.ai with your feedback or UID. We are committed to improving and hope to win back your trust!
reply_zh: 您好，对于这次令人失望的体验，我深表歉意。我们非常重视您在我们这里度过的时光，并希望能为您弥补遗憾。您能和我们分享一下具体出了什么问题吗？请发送电子邮件至 support@fantachat.ai，并附上您的反馈或 UID。我们致力于不断改进，并希望能重新赢回您的信任！
